title: Christchurch, CAN — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Christchurch, CAN: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Christchurch is a city in CAN with a population of 396,000. The largest city in the South Island, a rebuilt and resilient garden city with a burgeoning food scene and outdoor lifestyle.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
